front: What is a peptide conjugate and why is it formulated?
back: Peptide conjugates link peptides to other molecules for improved properties: 1) PEGylation (increased half-life), 2) Lipidation (albumin binding, oral bioavailability), 3) Antibody-drug conjugates (targeted delivery), 4) Fc fusion (extended circulation), 5) Prodrug forms (activation at target site).
